text:
Gelman is an language used in World of Hunter × Hunter. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 395 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

During Phantom Troupe's flashback, Chrollo gives a Gelman language lessons video tape to Phinks. After that, Chrollo informs Pakunoda that he already learned Gelman. 

Trivia

The language's name is probably derived from German. However, in the world of Hunter x Hunter, Gelman is presumably equivalent to real life English, given the fact that the global sensation Mighty Sweepin' Power Cleaners series was using it. If such is the case, all English names and phrases (e.g., Indoor Fish, Little Flower, Double Machine Gun, Skill Hunter, Bungee Gum, Texture Surprise, etc) are, in fact, in Gelman.
Also, in real life, English is a West Germanic language of the Indo-European language family.
Sarasa said that she memorized what the phrase “Power Cleaners” looks like in standard written Gelman. This implies that the language uses a different writing system than the main language used in the Hunter × Hunter world. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 396 
It is likely that either Gelman or Jannan was the language used to write the notes left by the people who murdered Sarasa, as Uvogin apparently couldn’t read them and demanded that Chrollo do so, to which he refused. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 38, Chapter 397
